description: 精致蓝调 - 蓝调极简 + 精致的层次 / 数字标号 / 渐变高亮,适合 AI / 产品 / 深度分析(main 号默认)

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #242832; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.35px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 28px 36px; background: #ffffff;
styles.h1: font-size: 23px; font-weight: 800; color: #0b1530; text-align: left; margin: 34px 0 20px; padding: 0 0 12px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #0b1530; letter-spacing: 0.3px; line-height: 1.4;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #0b1530; margin: 40px 0 18px; padding: 10px 16px 10px 14px; border-left: 4px solid #2e5bff; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #eef2ff 0%, #ffffff 70%); border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.h3: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2240; margin: 28px 0 12px; padding: 0 0 6px 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed #c7d2fe; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #242832; line-height: 1.85;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 18px 22px; background: #f4f6fc; border-left: 3px solid #2e5bff; color: #3a4463; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0 10px 10px 0; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 8px; margin: 24px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(11,21,48,0.08); border: 1px solid #eef2ff;
styles.strong: color: #0b1530; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 62%, #fff18a 62%, #fff18a 95%, transparent 95%); padding: 1px 6px;
styles.code_inline: background: #eef2ff; color: #2e3a8a; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; border: 1px solid #dbe4ff;
styles.code_block: background: #0f1729; color: #e1e7ff; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; border: 1px solid #1e2a4a; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #2e5bff; font-weight: 900; font-size: 14px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #2e5bff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #c7d2fe, transparent); margin: 38px 0;
styles.a: color: #2e5bff; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,91,255,0.35); padding-bottom: 1px;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e8ecf7; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #0b1530; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eef2ff; color: #242832; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a93a8; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #c7d2fe; letter-spacing: 14px; font-size: 11px; margin: 36px 0; user-select: none;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 55%, #fff18a 55%); color: #242832; padding: 1px 6px; font-weight: 600;

list_style.label: A · 渐变方块
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#2e5bff,#6b9fff); color: #ffffff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; min-width: 24px; height: 22px; line-height: 22px; text-align: center; border-radius: 6px; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 2px; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(46,91,255,0.25);
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#2e5bff,#6b9fff); border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 3px; box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(46,91,255,0.3);
